assets.name: charge_orb
assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style lightning attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact pre-strike orb with a white-hot core, cyan outer glow, and a few thin branching arcs that feel charged and contained. Keep the shape clean and readable in a game battle overlay. Preserve real electric energy structure but stylize the outline and color. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.

assets.name: travel_core
assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style lightning attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a short directional lightning streak with a white-hot center line, cyan glow, and a few controlled branching filaments. Keep the subject compact and readable, not beam-heavy or smoky. Preserve real electric energy structure but stylize the outline and color. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.

assets.name: impact_bloom
assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style lightning attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact target-hit electric bloom with a white-hot flash core, cyan-blue outer shock, and thin branching spikes that radiate cleanly from the center. Keep it punchy, readable, and battle-ready with a strong hit-stop feel. Preserve real electric energy structure but stylize the outline and color. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.

assets.name: residue_sparks
assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style lightning attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a fading spark residue made of small electric motes, soft arcs, and a few lingering bright fragments around a compact center. Keep contrast lower than the impact bloom but still crisp enough to read in battle. Preserve real electric energy structure but stylize the outline and color. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
